  • Exports
Source   Edit  

Prestige System

Victory point tracking and prestige modifiers per gameplay.md:1.1 and reference.md:9.4

Prestige represents House dominance and is the victory condition Victory: First to 5000 prestige OR last house standing

Prestige sources:

  • Military victories (combat, eliminations)
  • Economic prosperity (low taxes, colonies)
  • Technological advancement
  • Diplomatic actions

Prestige penalties:

  • High taxes (rolling average > 50%)
  • Blockaded colonies
  • Maintenance shortfalls
  • Military defeats
Prestige Values (loaded from config/prestige.toml)Prestige CalculationPrestige from Combat (operations.md:7.3.3)Prestige from EconomyPrestige from TechnologyVictory Conditions (gameplay.md:1.1)Morale Effects from Prestige (operations.md:7.1.4)

Imports

../common/types/core, config/prestige_config

Types

PrestigeEvent = object
  source*: PrestigeSource
  amount*: int
  description*: string
Single prestige gain/loss event Source   Edit   
PrestigeReport = object
  houseId*: HouseId
  startingPrestige*: int
  events*: seq[PrestigeEvent]
  endingPrestige*: int
Prestige changes for a turn Source   Edit   
PrestigeSource {.pure.} = enum
  CombatVictory, TaskForceDestroyed, FleetRetreated, SquadronDestroyed,
  ColonySeized, ColonyEstablished, TechAdvancement, LowTaxBonus, HighTaxPenalty,
  BlockadePenalty, MaintenanceShortfall, PactViolation, Eliminated
Sources of prestige gain/loss Source   Edit  

Consts

prestigeVictoryThreshold = 5000
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc applyBlockadePenalty(houseId: HouseId; blockadedColonies: int): PrestigeEvent {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Apply prestige penalty for blockaded colonies Per operations.md:6.2.6: -2 prestige per blockaded colony per turn Source   Edit   
proc applyHighTaxPenalty(houseId: HouseId; avgTaxRate: int): PrestigeEvent {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Apply prestige penalty from high rolling average tax Per economy.md:3.2.1 Source   Edit

    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Apply prestige bonus from low tax rate Per economy.md:3.2.2 Source   Edit

    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

                         taskForceDestroyed: bool; squadronsDestroyed: int;
                         forcedRetreat: bool): seq[PrestigeEvent] {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}

    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Calculate net prestige change from events Source   Edit   
proc checkDefensiveCollapse(prestige: int; turnsBelow: int): bool {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if house enters defensive collapse Per gameplay.md:1.4.1: Prestige < 0 for 3 consecutive turns Source   Edit

    forbids: [].}
Check if house achieved prestige victory Source   Edit   
proc createPrestigeEvent(source: PrestigeSource; amount: int;
                         description: string): PrestigeEvent {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create prestige event Source   Edit

                          events: seq[PrestigeEvent]): PrestigeReport {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create prestige report for house Source   Edit   
proc getMoraleCERModifier(prestige: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get morale modifier to CER from prestige Per operations.md:7.1.4 Note: Requires turn-based morale check roll (not implemented here) Source   Edit   
proc getMoraleROEModifier(prestige: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
